title: CVE-2026-2515: Hostinger Reach RCE
summary: [P1] The Hostinger Reach plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to arbitrary code execution, with no patch available. This vulnerability can be exploited to gain unauthorized access to sensitive data. Why now: Reported attribution (unverified): none (confidence: 0.80)
classification_reasoning: The vulnerability allows for arbitrary code execution, which is a clear indication of rce.

title: CVE-2026-41051: csync2 Insecure Temporary Directories
